titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Mamar Ibn Khallad
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Mamar Ibn Khallad

segments: ه عن معمر بن خلّاد فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل؛ و محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه؛ و أحمد بن زياد بن جعفر الهمدانيّ- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن معمر بن خلّاد.
arabic.text: ه عن معمر بن خلّاد فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل؛ و محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه؛ و أحمد بن زياد بن جعفر الهمدانيّ- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن معمر بن خلّاد.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mamar ibn Khallad has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil, Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh, and Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Jafar Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them all - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Mamar ibn Khallad.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mamar ibn Khallad has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil, Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh, and Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Jafar Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them all - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Mamar ibn Khallad.
